table-446-446.caption: What is the language and flavor text of the card that has colorpie watermark? List out the type of this card.
data: "The first sign was a strange film that coated the bones of the fallen."
"It is not the master of the Chromatic Dragon, but its child, a scion of things to come."
"The borderposts define more than territories; they define possibility."
"The maze is the final test of worth for those who seek audience with the Guildpact."
